Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: network_tap
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Network Tap — Cloud Storage Exfiltration via MEGA cloud upload.
Source: 10.4.50.86 → mega.nz/cs?id=... (MEGA API)
  method=POST/PUT with OAuth Bearer token
  zip_created_before_upload=YES
  zip_size_mb=17.0
  initiating_process=python.exe
  hour=03:xx (off-hours)
  destination_account=UNKNOWN (attacker-controlled)

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  Authorized cloud backup services use service accounts registered in the CMDB, operate on a schedule, and upload to company-owned cloud accounts. A 17.0MB ZIP upload to an unknown MEGA account from python.exe at 03:00 is not an authorized backup.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  ZIP created immediately before upload: staging behavior (collect → compress → exfil). Upload to mega.nz (cloud service) via OAuth token: attacker-controlled account. parent=python.exe (not a backup service binary). Off-hours (03:xx): avoiding detection. destination_account=unknown: not a company-owned cloud account.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Source 10.4.50.86 has exfiltrated 17.0MB to attacker-controlled MEGA account. Data is now outside corporate infrastructure.
[CONCLUSION] Cloud storage exfiltration confirmed via MEGA cloud upload.
</analysis>
TRUE POSITIVE. MITRE T1567 (Exfiltration to Code Repository/Service). Block cloud storage API endpoints from workstations, investigate ZIP contents.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: contain
